title: Shuffled
description: This resourcepack shuffles textures of all items, blocks, etc.
body: This resourcepack shuffles textures of all blocks, items, paintings, effects, particles, etc with themselves (so blocks cant get an item texture), and also shuffled between groups based on transparency, so that you can't look through solid blocks (atleast most of the times). Basically a block of dirt can look like an amethyst and so on.
